positive: A flat lay, minimalist illustration design featuring a collection of stylized botanical elements: dried lavender sprigs, delicate ferns, small geometric gold accents, and a single crescent moon. The background should be a soft, muted sage green or dusty rose color. Style: Modern Scandinavian aesthetic, flat design, vector art, clean lines, elegant, suitable for nursery decor or journal printing. Focus on negative space and harmonious composition. High quality, commercial illustration, minimalist, Scandinavian style, 300 dpi.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, photorealistic, messy, cluttered, gradients, smoke, complex shadows
